reviews.comment:
Estación de servicio grande. Tardan bastante el atender para cargar combustible. Mucha gente. Alrededor hay puestos de comida con mesas para comer afuera.

(Translated by Google)
Large gas station. Service is quite slow when filling up. Very busy. There are food stalls nearby with tables for eating outside.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnNl96UnF3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Mucha demora en el tramite de tarjeta..al parecer tiene una sola linea..!! Es insolito con la cantidad de gente que pasa... Administrador...pongase las pilas..!!

(Translated by Google)
It takes a long time to process my card...it seems to only have one line!! It's incredible considering the number of people passing through... Administrator...get your act together!!

reviewReply.comment: Gracias por su calificación y comentario
